cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Anthony could have gone to the amusement park. Let me start by listing all the given information and then see what times are available for him to go. First, Anthony woke up at 6am. Then, Leslie saw him reading at the library from 6am to 8am. So that's from 6 to 8. Then Jennifer saw him working out at the gym from 8am to 9am. Then Anthony saw Anthony buying cookies at a bakery from 2pm to 9pm. Wait, that seems like a long time, from 2pm to 9pm. Then William saw him buying a bike at the bike shop from 9pm to 10pm. And the amusement park was closed after 10pm. So the question is, when could Anthony have gone to the amusement park? The options are (A) 9pm to 10pm, (B) 9am to 2pm, (C) 6am to 8am, (D) 2pm to 9pm.
